subject: [PATCH 3/9] sched/fair: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch converts WARN*() calls in the Linux kernel's scheduler to SCHED_WARN*() variants. The SCHED_WARN*() macros defer console output under rq->lock, preventing potential deadlocks due to synchronous console output. This change is intended to prevent issues with legacy or boot consoles configured on systems where these warnings might fire.
